instance.markdownDescription:
Artifactory repository URL

URL for the remote Artifactory instance (e.g., https://myusername.jfrog.io/artifactory)

token.markdownDescription:
Artifactory instance access token

Artifactory [access token](https://jfrog.com/help/r/jfrog-platform-administration-documentation/access-tokens) for this remote instance. This value should be set via an [environment variable](https://doc.log10x.com/api/js/#TenXEnv.get):  ``` yaml artifactoryToken: $=TenXEnv.get("ARTIFACTORY_TOKEN") ```

repo.markdownDescription:
Artifactory repository name

Name of the [repository](https://jfrog.com/help/r/jfrog-artifactory-documentation/repository-management) within the target Artifactory instance from which to pull the specified file.

files.markdownDescription:
Remote repository file paths

Paths of files within the target Artifactory instance repository to pull

folders.markdownDescription:
Remote repository folder paths

Paths of folders within the target Artifactory instance repository to pull

recursive.markdownDescription:
Pull files from remote repository folders recursively

Specifies whether to pull files from [artifactoryFolders](https://doc.log10x.com/compile/pull/artifactory/#artifactoryfolders) recursively (i.e., pull sub-folders as well). (Accepts boolean or string with $= prefix for runtime evaluation) (Default: false)
